title: ARPAN Medium Resin Woven Storage Basket Box With Lid & Lock - White

Quality Storage Box Ideal for Storing Kids Toys, Food Storage, Books, important papers, Post, Living Room, Bathroom, Kitchen, Nursery, School, Office, storing Beauty Accessories, small cloths including bits and bobs - Best Gift on All Occasion
Resin Woven On Metal frame with Lid & Leather Look strap Lock With insert handles Nesting for convenient storage and Light Weight allow easy to transport.

description: Product Description Built for Daily Use ARPAN Storage hamper fits neatly into almost space for better organization. It features lid & leather look strap lock with insert handles for simple transport and easy storage. Suitable for any room in the home, it can be used in the closet, bathroom, bedroom, and more for everyday laundry storage. When morning routines run smoothly, because everything is in its place, your day starts off a better. When smart products help streamline household chores. We believe a well-organized home makes being at home more enjoyable Storage box basket hamper made with resin material on strong metal wire frame with white Matt finish, sturdy flare base allow basket to stand on any flat surface. About ARPAN CLARIS HOUSEWARES & STATIONERY SOLUTIONS LTD is one of the largest range of stationery and houseware products supplier on wholesale and online platform, Our products are carefully designed, sourced and manufactured under ARPAN brand. we offer amazing value without compromising on our quality. We have one of the UK's largest selections range of diaries and calendars, storage baskets, Laundry baskets, Photo frames, photo albums, School and Office Stationery. All products inventively designed for office, School, home, business and commercial use. Our beautifully designed products are growing year-on-year giving us a sharp advantage on the competition in UK & International market. All-occasion storage Available in a versatile white, the woven baskets are suitable for use in a variety of rooms in your home, securely storing anything from kid’s toys to food, books or bathroom toiletries. With three different sizes, you can use in stylish stacked form or as storage in different rooms around the house. Fashionable style The fashionable, chic woven style of the hamper boxes mean that organising your belongings doesn’t have to be an ugly feat, with a leather-look strap and metal lock for that sleek, quality feel. Functional form for maximum usage The boxes can be securely fastened to prevent easy-opening by children, and boasting a strong metal frame to ensure your belongings remain protected and the box remains at its full dimensional capacity. Nesting handles make for easy storage on the move. Household Essential Storage Basket Classic, attractive ARPAN Storage Basket adds a modern, contemporary style look to a Home, Office or Household Decoration. Durable, functional Strong white resin weaving on metal frame. It features lid & leather look strap lock with insert handles that allow for easy transport. Ideal use Ideal for kitchen, living room, bedroom, bathroom and other places to use. It is also an amazing decoration. Specifications Medium : W33cm X D24cm X H15.5cm, Resin woven on a strong metal frame Modern contemporary design Lid & leather look strap lock with insert handles Item Weight: 250g Approx.
